experience.title: AI Software Engineer — Founding Team
bullets: Built and automated backoffice operations for fintech industry, **streamlining processes and reducing manual work**

Architected and deployed secure infrastructure stack for platform hosting and **LLM deployment**, ensuring regulatory compliance via IAC

experience.title: Data Scientist

Post-acquisition, responsible for maintaining and **teaching existing data science systems** to the wider teams at Similarweb
Re-implemented and enhanced current systems to leverage **advanced predictive capabilities**

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: **Led and developed the data science team**, empowering and mentoring members. Spearheaded project formulation and execution, ensuring successful ML model deployment
**App Categorization:** Advanced IAB classification with **text embedding** and **cosine similarity** — **doubled coverage** and **increased accuracy by 25%**
**Revenue Estimation:** Sophisticated models to estimate app earnings for **better-targeted marketing strategies** and informed **business decisions**
**App Matching:** Graph-based system using **Spark** and **computer vision** for efficient cross-marketplace app matching
**Demographics Estimation:** Implemented demographic estimation through **computer vision** and **Spark** for **targeted marketing campaigns**
Integrated **vector databases** and **RAG search** for easy review analysis and app discovery

experience.title: Junior Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Created a **NLP model to identify the preferred incentives** of the Swiss political class toward predetermined domains
Creation of a **web application for automatic detection of false watches** based on vibration signature analysis

education.title: Master of Robotics — Deep Learning
education.description: Master oriented toward **machine-learning techniques applied to autonomous systems** and **continuous improvement** workflows. Thesis: **Monocular 3D vehicle detection** and distance estimation with self-attention mechanism.

education.title: Bachelor of Micro-engineering
education.description: Learned programming and the basics of **micro-engineering and mechanical engineering** to build complex products.

academic.title: VITA Laboratory
academic.description: Developed an attention-based mechanism for **human and vehicle detection and 3D localization from a monocular RGB image** (no lidar or stereo). Originally developed for Transformers in NLP, here applied to visual tasks.

academic.title: Intern Digital Engineering — Industry 4.0
academic.description: Proposed data processing techniques to detect defects and adapt machine speed. Worked on a parameter adaptation solution that **reduces the number of stops by 80%**.

academic.title: Machine Learning Intern
academic.description: Implemented a ML model to **detect humans with both thermal (FLIR) and RGB cameras**. Optimised the network to work on an NVIDIA Jetson — backbone still used in the company's main product.

publications.title: Force Adaptation in Contact Tasks with Dynamical Systems
publications.description: Designed an **online force adaptation system** for impedance-controlled robots. Enables collaborative work without additional sensors — **reduction of biggest perturbations by 90%** while learning from the task.
